sentence_reviews.text: Support-vector machines maximize a separating margin; kernel variants obtain nonlinear boundaries through similarity functions that act as implicit feature maps.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 5 machine-learning basics on support vector machines and kernels; PML kernel methods / SVM topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The margin and kernel-trick characterization is standard and supported by the cited topics.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Support vector & kernel machines is to connect Kernels & implicit feature maps, Margin, ranking & metric objectives to downstream capabilities including Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML SVM/kernel-method topics; supervised classification/regression context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernel and margin dependencies are supported; the downstream tabular decision-support role is synthesized but defensible.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Tabular predictive analytics & decision support
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML supervised SVM/classification topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: SVMs are standard supervised predictors for feature-vector/tabular tasks; 'decision support' is atlas wording.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Kernels & implicit feature maps
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning SVM/kernel discussion; PML kernel methods topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernel SVMs directly combine SVMs with kernel/implicit feature-map machinery.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Kernels & implicit feature maps, Margin, ranking & metric objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML SVM/kernel-method model-selection context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependencies are supported, but the limitation wording is generic and not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: Support vector & kernel machines is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Kernels & implicit feature maps.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML kernel SVM / kernel method topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernelized SVMs directly depend on kernel methods.

sentence_reviews.text: Support vector & kernel machines is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Margin, ranking & metric objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML SVM maximum-margin topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Maximum-margin objectives are defining for SVMs.

sentence_reviews.text: Support vector & kernel machines follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML supervised classification/regression SVM topics.

edge_reviews.notes: Kernel variants directly use kernel methods / implicit feature maps; composes/core is supported.
SVMs are maximum-margin methods; optimizes_for/core is supported.
SVMs are normally supervised predictors; trained_under/common is supported.
